content: I'm going to continue the dialogue through speech-to-text, so I hope you're not disturbed by the lack of punctuation, although I'll try to insert it where necessary to avoid any confusion, period.So I mean to relate a short history of my life in order to provide you with a better basis of understanding who I am and where I've come from. In the first place, I was born in Gary, Indiana in 1963 on the 3rd of September. I'm told that I was born prematurely, about a month premature, and that I spent my first ten days in an incubator, full stop. This has given me food for thought in recent times and I've done a little research on the effects of incubation at birth or after birth to be more exact.
